tool_args.hypothesis: transferFrom lacks proper allowance check or reduction, allowing arbitrary transfers from any account without approval.

steps.tool_result: {"ok": true, "target_function": "transferFrom", "hypothesis": "transferFrom lacks proper allowance check or reduction, allowing arbitrary transfers from any account without approval."}

tool_args.exploit_logic: Call transferFrom from attacker to move tokens from victim with no prior approve; expect balances to change if allowance isn't enforced.

tool_args.evidence: Foundry test passed demonstrating transferFrom can transfer tokens from an arbitrary account without allowance checks. The PoC deploys ANCHToken, mints tokens to victim, and attacker calls transferFrom(victim, attacker, amount) successfully, stealing funds; forge test passed (see run_forge result).
